---

description: "List all the delivery items of an outgoing webhook of a Bitrise application"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List the webhook delivery items of an app"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/outgoing-webhooks/{app-webhook-slug}/delivery-items"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all the delivery items of an outgoing webhook of a Bitrise application
